title: They Might Be Giants played “Exquisite Dead Guy” for the first time in over 25 years in NYC (pics, video, setlist)
caption: 🎉🎶 Giants among us! They Might Be Giants rocked NYC with a blast from the past - "Exquisite Dead Guy" after 25 years! Check out the pics and setlist! 🤘 #musicnews #TMBG

title: Julia Jacklin Signs To 4AD, Announces Extensive Tour
caption: 🎶 Exciting news! Julia Jacklin joins the 4AD fam and hits the road with a massive tour! Who's ready for some live music magic? 🌟 #JuliaJacklin #MusicNews
